subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. His are the might and power, the grandeur and sovereignty, and He is the One Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو له العزه و الاقتدار و العظمه و الاختیار و هو الذی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
